description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a modern yet classic design, featuring a light-colored facade and a gabled roof. The front of the house includes a driveway leading to a garage, a landscaped entryway with planters, and a covered porch. The backyard is spacious, containing a swimming pool, a small shed, and a variety of trees and shrubs, all enclosed by a fence. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light. The property is surrounded by well-maintained greenery, including several mature trees and manicured lawns. The overall layout suggests a comfortable family residence with both functional and recreational outdoor spaces.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gabled roof, symmetrical windows, a garage, and landscaped front and back yards featuring a pool and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entryway with porch, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard with trees and a pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, shed, and garden area with a fence and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, pool, shed, and the side of the house with additional greenery.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, double front doors, flanked by planters and columns
